nasb.text: My eye has wasted away because of affliction; I have called upon You every day, O Lord; I have spread out my hands to You.

esv.text: my eye grows dim through sorrow. Every day I call upon you, O Lord; I spread out my hands to you.

cnv.text: 我的眼睛因困苦而昏花； 耶和華啊，我天天向你呼求， 向你舉手禱告。

ccb.text: 我的眼睛因哭泣而视力模糊。 耶和华啊，我天天呼求你， 举手向你呼求。

csbs.text: 我的眼睛因苦难而干瘪； 耶和华啊，我每天呼求你， 向你展开双手！
